featuresGrid.subtitle: ChatGPT doesn't know UEM standards, doesn't write in Mozambican Portuguese and doesn't export a formatted document. aptto does.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What students using aptto are saying

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about aptto.

item1.question: Does aptto write the whole paper for me?
item1.answer: No. aptto structures, suggests and formats, but the review and academic responsibility stay with you. That is the difference between a copilot and a generator.

item2.question: Will my advisor notice that I used AI?
item2.answer: aptto produces text in Mozambican academic Portuguese with ABNT standards and coherent structure. It does not read like generic AI output, but you should always review and personalize the content before submitting.

item3.question: How much time can I save with aptto?
item3.answer: Automatic structuring saves hours of organization. ABNT normalization saves even more formatting time. Overall, a paper that could take a whole night can be prepared in a fraction of that time.

item4.question: Does aptto work for my type of assignment?
item4.answer: Yes. aptto supports three levels: secondary education, technical education and higher education. Each level has its own structure, prompts and cover model.

item5.question: How does pricing work?
item5.answer: You start free with 1 work per month. If you need more, paid packages range from {starterPrice} to {proPrice} MZN per month. Extra works cost {extraWorkPrice} MZN each and stay valid for {validityMonths} months.

item6.question: Can I use it on mobile?
item6.answer: Yes. aptto runs in the browser on mobile, tablet and desktop. You do not need to install anything.

item7.question: Does aptto use Mozambican Portuguese?
item7.answer: Yes. The text is tuned for the academic Portuguese used in Mozambican universities. No Brazilianisms and no generic chatbot tone.

item8.question: Can I export in DOCX and PDF?
item8.answer: DOCX is available on every plan. PDF is exclusive to the PRO plan.
